fields.Name: PostgreSQL (External)
fields.Description: Live, read-only proxied access to an external PostgreSQL database via the node-postgres (pg) driver. Use for querying a Postgres instance that lives outside the MemberJunction database.

fields.Name: Snowflake (External)
fields.Description: Live, read-only proxied access to a Snowflake account via the official snowflake-sdk. Supports password, programmatic access token (PAT), and key-pair (SNOWFLAKE_JWT) authentication. ANSI SQL with LIMIT/OFFSET paging.

fields.Name: MongoDB (External)
fields.Description: Live, read-only proxied access to an external MongoDB database via the official mongodb driver. RunView filters use a contained SQL-WHERE -> Mongo translation; native queries run aggregation pipelines supplied as JSON. Schema is inferred by sampling documents.

fields.Name: SQL Server (External)
fields.Description: Live, read-only proxied access to an external Microsoft SQL Server database via the node-mssql driver. T-SQL dialect with TOP / OFFSET-FETCH paging and INFORMATION_SCHEMA + sys.* introspection (tables, columns, primary keys, foreign keys).

fields.Name: MySQL (External)
fields.Description: Live, read-only proxied access to an external MySQL / MariaDB database via the mysql2 driver. Backtick-quoted identifiers, LIMIT/OFFSET paging, and INFORMATION_SCHEMA introspection (tables, columns, primary keys, foreign keys).

fields.Name: Oracle (External)
fields.Description: Live, read-only proxied access to an external Oracle database via node-oracledb in Thin mode (no Instant Client required). Double-quoted identifiers, OFFSET/FETCH paging, :named bind parameters, and ALL_* catalog introspection (tables, columns, primary keys, foreign keys).
